zh.lifeSummary: 當William De Worthington於1254年出生在英國藍卡爾沃辛頓時，他的父親Hugh De Worthington16歲，母親Denise de Halsall9歲。他於1275年之前與Mary Alice Bryde在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1330年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃辛頓享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William De Worthington于1254年出生在英国藍卡爾沃辛頓时，他的父亲Hugh De Worthington16岁，母亲Denise de Halsall9岁。他于1275年之前与Mary Alice Bryde在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃辛頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1330年在英国英格兰藍卡爾沃辛頓享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Worthington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire, Cheshire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and Leicestershire named Worthington. The placenames probably derive from an Old English personal name Weorth + Old English connective -ing- + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.
History: Nicholas Worthington emigrated from England to Old Saybrook, CT, c. 1650.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When William De Worthington was born in 1254, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, his father, Hugh De Worthington, was 16 and his mother, Denise de Halsall, was 9. He married Mary Alice Bryde before 1275, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1330, in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William De Worthington est né en 1254, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh De Worthington, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Denise de Halsall, avait 9 ans. Il a épousé Mary Alice Bryde avant 1275, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1330, à Worthington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William De Worthington 1254 in Worthington, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh De Worthington 16 und seine Mutter Denise de Halsall 9. Er hat vor 1275 in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Mary Alice Bryde geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1330 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Worthington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William De Worthington è nato il nel 1254 nel Worthington, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Hugh De Worthington, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Denise de Halsall, aveva 9 anni. Lui sposato Mary Alice Bryde prima del 1275, nel Worthington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1330, nel Worthington, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 77 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William De Worthingtonが1254年にイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンで生まれた時，父Hugh De Worthingtonは16歳，母Denise de Halsallは9歳であった。1275年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンでMary Alice Brydeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1330年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアウオルスイントンで77歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William De Worthington(이)가 1254년 영국 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh De Worthington(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Denise de Halsall(은)는 9세였다. 그는 1275년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 Mary Alice Bryde(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1330년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워스잉턴에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William De Worthington nasceu em 1254, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh De Worthington, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Denise de Halsall, tinha 9 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Alice Bryde antes 1275, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1330, em Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 77 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William De Worthington родился в 1254 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh De Worthington было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Denise de Halsall, 9. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Alice Bryde перед 1275 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1330 г. в местности вортингтон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William De Worthington nació en 1254, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh De Worthington, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Denise de Halsall, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Mary Alice Bryde antes de 1275, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1330, en Worthington, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 77 años.
